title: Immutable public operation vocabulary
description: The v1 product verbs are Create Draft, Get Plan Revision, List Plan Revisions, Activate Plan Revision, Get Budget Position, and Discover Contract. BUDGET exposes no Save/upsert, in-place Edit, Delete, Copy, Rollover, Reopen, or autonomous Rebalance operation. Technical design may assign versioned operation identifiers but must preserve these semantics.
